acceptance_criteria: Final thesis-facing reports separate automated consistency from thesis claim readiness.
Manual-review-dependent metrics remain pending unless annotation fields are completed.
Benchmark v2 is described as the main internal thesis benchmark, not external aviation validation.
Graph/path metrics are labelled heuristic unless manually reviewed.
Robustness and sufficiency results are both visible in RQ4 safety interpretation.
No report claims operational flight readiness, external certification, or POH/ATC/checklist replacement.
manual_review_dependencies: Benchmark v2 wording, evidence sufficiency, answer-key correctness, and risk categories.
All 20 insufficient-evidence labels need aviation safety review.
Graph path relevance labels for traversal path metrics.
Answer faithfulness, answer correctness, and answer relevance if used as thesis evidence.
must_fix: Dashboard `all_passed` currently conflates artifact consistency with claim readiness while benchmark, path, and triple semantic review remain pending.
RQ4 safety interpretation underplays robustness failures relative to sufficiency evaluation.
Live query and robustness paths need sufficiency/advisory-boundary gating before answers are treated as safe evidence.
Benchmark v2 remains machine-seeded; structural validation must not be described as semantic or expert review.
KG claims must distinguish schema/provenance validity from semantic correctness.
Path metrics must remain diagnostic heuristics, not semantic path correctness or retrieval superiority.
nice_to_have: Add paired bootstrap deltas for vector-vs-hybrid and lexical-vs-traversal comparisons.
Add inter-annotator agreement if multiple reviewers annotate benchmark/triple/path samples.
Add an externally authored natural-question set before broader domain-correctness claims.
Add preflight checks for ignored chunks/indexes and optional GraphRAG dependencies.
should_fix: Show supported-only and insufficient-evidence retrieval breakdowns to avoid distorted mixed aggregates.
Expose bootstrap CI metadata visibly in Markdown/dashboard rather than only JSON or comments.
Mark answer metrics as deterministic heuristics in table labels.
Keep `reports-review` from rewriting data artifacts unless explicitly requested.
Document clean-checkout prerequisites for chunks, Chroma indexes, and GraphRAG optional dependencies.

acceptance_criteria: Every RQ has comparator, metric, result, limitation, and supported wording.
Dashboard distinguishes automated consistency from claim readiness.
must_fix: RQ4 cites sufficiency and robustness but surfaces the favorable sufficiency result more prominently.
RQ2 evidence traceability is not yet proven as an improvement over vector-only citation metrics.
Benchmark v2 is still machine-seeded and should be provisional internal evidence.
nice_to_have: Add claim/evidence/limitation table to final report.
Report paired deltas rather than only separate CIs.
should_fix: Do not imply hybrid clearly outperforms vector when CIs overlap.
unsafe_claims: GraphRAG can improve traceability should be narrowed to adds inspectable KG/path evidence.
Sufficiency improves safety is too strong without robustness reconciliation.

acceptance_criteria: Retrieval reports show answerability breakdowns.
Path metrics are labelled heuristic in tables and notes.
must_fix: Vector and hybrid budgets are not equal for every @k comparison.
Mixed supported/no-answer retrieval aggregates distort Recall/MRR and Context Recall.
Path support heuristic is too lenient for semantic path correctness.
should_fix: Qualify KG evidence coverage as entity-overlap evidence.
Make answer metric labels visibly heuristic.
unsafe_claims: Path Recall@5 must not be presented as retrieval superiority.
Sufficiency safety should be framed as diagnostic unless non-gold-aware baselines are added.

acceptance_criteria: KG claims say schema/provenance-valid unless manual annotations are complete.
Triple review summary only reports rates when reviewed_total > 0.
manual_review_dependencies: Review class-token, supportedByEvidence, duplicate, and generic KG patterns.
must_fix: Evidence-in-source rate must not be read as semantic evidence support.
Dashboard `all_passed` is misleading while semantic review is unfinished.
KG semantic correctness is not established.
nice_to_have: Add warnings for subject/object labels beginning with `Cl_`.
Add task-ontology wording directly to ontology comments.
should_fix: Keep schema validity, provenance validity, and semantic correctness separate.
Resolve publication-readiness ambiguity in ontology evaluation.
unsafe_claims: Valid triples or all_passed must not imply correct triples.

acceptance_criteria: Reviewed subset contains explicit pending review statuses.
No accepted reviewed label claims external expert certification.
manual_review_dependencies: All 20 no-answer labels need safety review.
Cross-page labels need source-page and synthesis review.
must_fix: Benchmark v2 is explicitly machine-seeded.
Machine wording is systemic.
Cross-page labels are under-flagged.
Some answer spans are truncated.
nice_to_have: Add manual fields for naturalness, span completeness, evidence support, synthesis, and safety.
subagent_findings.recommended_subset: Reviewer proposed an alternate 60-label subset emphasizing safety, cross-page, supported factual, and mixed terminology/paraphrase labels. Implementation follows the user-specified core subset: all concept_definition, relation_causal, cross_page, and insufficient_evidence labels.
should_fix: Improve review rules for cross-page synthesis and filler entities.
Separate structural validation from human-reviewed subset status.
unsafe_claims: All insufficient-evidence labels need safety review, not only automatically flagged labels.

acceptance_criteria: Operational/live query prompts abstain before generation.
Robustness unsupported cases have zero boundary violations or are reported as unresolved.
must_fix: Live query lacked a sufficiency/advisory boundary gate.
Robustness reported false_answer_rate=1.0 and four boundary violations.
Risk-category accuracy is circular when expected risk is derived by the same detector.
nice_to_have: Add numerator/denominator displays beside safety rates.
should_fix: Add independent expected risk categories to no-answer labels.
unsafe_claims: Generated robustness artifacts contained unsafe answer behavior for operational prompts.

acceptance_criteria: No thesis-all path requires API keys.
Reports expose CI metadata with n, seed, samples, and confidence.
Report-only targets do not rewrite data artifacts by default.
manual_review_dependencies: Benchmark, path, triple, and answer reviews remain pending.
must_fix: Clean checkout reproducibility depends on ignored chunks/indexes.
CI reporting is incomplete or hidden in Markdown.
Run IDs and timings prevent byte-identical report reruns.
should_fix: Do not let reports-review rewrite reviewed gold files by default.
Include n, confidence, and seed in bootstrap CI results.
unsafe_claims: Makefile determinism should mention prepared local artifacts and optional dependencies.

acceptance_criteria: Final report surfaces benchmark, safety, KG, path, and answer limitations consistently.
No manual-pending artifact is treated as validated evidence.
manual_review_dependencies: Review all 120 benchmark labels or clearly limit claims to reviewed subsets.
Complete triple and path review before semantic/path correctness claims.
must_fix: A strict examiner could reject the methodology if machine-seeded pending artifacts are treated as validated.
Safety claim is inconsistent across sufficiency and robustness.
KG semantic correctness is not established.
Path metrics are heuristic but used as RQ3 evidence.
should_fix: Downgrade main benchmark support until review statuses are completed.
Expand answer evaluation beyond heuristic pilot evidence before strong answer-quality claims.
unsafe_claims: Avoid KG validation proves triples are correct.
Avoid safety-aware abstention works without qualification.
GraphRAG improves evidence traceability compared with vector-only RAG.
Sufficiency improves safety without robustness qualification.
Benchmark v2 supports thesis main claims without manual-review caveats.
KG validation proves triple semantic correctness.
Path Recall@5 proves graph reasoning or retrieval superiority.
Risk-category accuracy proves safety when labels are derived by the same detector.
